checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 078 follows the active execution contract: repository memory closure, issue 076 scope completion, runtime diagnostics, runtime execution validator and schema updates, v5-live-status, documentation, tests, final report, audit packet, and ChatGPT/Codex audit evidence.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: v5-live-status returns ok true with live_status completed_with_coordinator_remediation and readiness_status ready_for_second_live_pilot. CLI tests cover v5-live-status and dry-run failure_diagnostics. Runtime execution validation accepts historical artifacts and validates the diagnostics object when present.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changes are inside the issue 078 scope. The task did not launch live Claude Code or Antigravity sessions and did not touch protected credentials, production, dependency installation, auth, billing, database, CI/CD security, or deployment surfaces.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: failure_diagnostics stores bounded 240-character redacted previews only, plus stream metadata already recorded by runtime execution artifacts. It does not store raw unbounded stdout or stderr.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are declared in .specbridge/scopes/issue-078-v5-live-status-diagnostics.scope.json. Existing untracked .agents and .claude/settings.local.json remain outside staged task scope.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Local v5-live-status, runtime execution validation, contract validation, scope validation, schema validation, final report validation, audit packet validation, ChatGPT audit validation, standard validation, CLI tests, negative validation, smoke validation, security gate, review gate, and git diff check have passed.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub PR CI is not collected yet and remains an external merge gate. The audit packet marks it not_collected rather than passed.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records pending final gates, pending GitHub CI, no deployment, historical issue 076 diagnostics compatibility, and remaining live executor autonomy risk.

findings.evidence: Historical issue 076 live CLI executor attempts failed twice before coordinator remediation. Issue 078 improves future diagnostics but does not rerun live executors.
findings.recommendation: Use the new diagnostics in a second serious live pilot that requires live implementation, tests, and docs slices to complete without coordinator remediation.

unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending.
The next serious live pilot still needs to prove live executor completion without coordinator remediation.
